title: Chassis repository coherence report
description: Machine-readable longitudinal coherence signals: authority alignment, stale metadata, schema validation, and trust ladder for agent context ranking. Produced by `chassis coherence`.

generated_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp when the report was generated.

runtime_evidence_sources.description: Canonical list of repo-relative paths to runtime evidence batch JSON files that coherence loaded (may be empty). Mirrors under summary.runtime_evidence_sources and summary.observed_truth.runtime_evidence_sources are identical.

debt.description: Aggregate CONTRACT debt[] counts from summarize_contract_debt.

runtime_evidence_sources.description: Deprecated mirror of top-level runtime_evidence_sources. Prefer the root field; this list is always identical for backward-compatible consumers.

promotion_policy_gap_count.description: Findings for missing reviewer acknowledgments or verified+blocking debt.

assurance_ladder.description: Rollup of CONTRACT.yaml assurance_level fields across the tree. Counts per tier + the lowest observed tier. CI can gate on advancement (e.g. fail if lowest < verified).

lowest.description: Lowest observed tier across all contracts. `unset` means at least one contract declares no level.

observed_truth.description: Runtime evidence rollup: declared_unobserved refs, coverage, and observation counts. Loaded batch file paths are mirrored here from top-level runtime_evidence_sources (identical list).

runtime_evidence_sources.description: Mirror of top-level runtime_evidence_sources; always the same list for consumers that read observed_truth as a unit.

observation_count.description: Total observation rows counted across loaded batch files (not the same as summary.runtime_evidence_observation_count, which counts runtime_evidence_signal findings).

observed_coverage_ratio.description: Fraction of contracts with matching runtime observations.

contracts_with_evidence.description: Count of contracts with runtime evidence backing.

confidence_impact.description: Overall impact of runtime evidence on confidence: high (>=50% coverage), medium (>=20%), low (>0 observations), none.

trust_ladder.description: Epistemic ranking for context artifacts (same source as schemas/coherence/trust-ladder.data.json).

authority_ledger.description: Optional per-path authority/freshness snapshot for agent ranking (verified vs inferred vs generated).

truth_classification.description: Explicit classification: canonical (verified truth), debt (inferred, needs promotion), explanatory (prose/generated, not authoritative).

autonomy_hints.description: Repository-native policy suggestions keyed to finding severities (not enforced — integrators map to gates).

path.description: Repo-relative path to primary file or directory.

code.description: Stable sub-code, e.g. authority classification key.

location.description: JSON Pointer or validator location when applicable.

trust_rank_hint.description: Trust ladder rank most affected (see trust_ladder[].rank).

stale_reasons.description: Machine-readable stale triggers for metadata_stale findings (e.g. implementation_newer_than_manifest, architecture_ir_newer_than_manifest).

drift_adapter.description: Drift engine adapter summary when this row is a drift_finding.
